findings.description: Flowchart diagram is completely missing and replaced by an unstructured text list of its labels.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains a graphical flowchart diagram for the Upper Cape Fear Basin. The HTML version omits this diagram entirely, extracting only the text labels from within the shapes and rendering them as a sequential vertical text list.

findings.description: Visual flowchart diagrams on pages 10 through 16 are missing and were extracted only as raw, disconnected text, causing a complete loss of relational meaning.
findings.evidence:
In the PDF, pages 10-16 display complex graphical flowcharts showing nodes and directional flow arcs (e.g., 'Flow Chart of Major Nodes in the Upper Cape Fear Basin'). In the HTML, these diagrams are missing and instead rendered as a flat sequence of disconnected paragraphs (e.g., '

Reidsville Dam

Lake Brandt

Greensboro Demand

'), making it impossible to understand the operational flow.
